ksa_text: Ability to identify, connect, and influence key stakeholders to speed data and AI adoption, mapping stakeholder relationships, building coalitions, and creating influence channels for organizational change.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-A-004 (LS, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4613 is insufficient to establish relevance to performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.461, nist_ai_rmf=0.461, eu_ai_act=0.446) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4613 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-A-004 (composite 0.4613) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4613 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Performance Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4613 is not a standard requirement for Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4613, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
